channel.title: Gary Talbot Updates
channel.description: Build notes, shipped-work updates, and public experiments from Gary Talbot.

item.title: Version 1.5: added a choose-your-own-door shortcut deck
item.description: Added a front-page shortcut deck that routes visitors straight into useful tools, weird experiments, or direct project contact.

item.title: Version 1.4: made the site warmer, weirder, and more alive
item.description: Pushed a visual redesign pass across the homepage, work hub, and updates archive with richer color, glow, ornament, and asymmetry.

item.title: Version 1.2: surfaced the current launch queue
item.description: Added a compact launch-window section so the current 24-hour action plan is visible from the work hub instead of hiding in private notes.

item.title: Version 1.1: put the useful tools on the front door
item.description: Reworked the homepage and work page so Unit Price Checker and Layoff Runway lead the proof instead of hiding behind generic portfolio furniture.

item.title: Unit Price Checker shipped publicly
item.description: Published a grocery and household comparison tool with mixed-unit conversion, pack counts, coupon-aware math, and shareable state.

item.title: Layoff Runway shipped publicly
item.description: Published a focused layoff survival calculator with runway math, burn-rate output, and a no-backend checklist follow-up CTA.

item.title: Version 1.0: launched the updates archive
item.description: Added a dedicated /updates/ page, rewired the homepage to point at stable entries, and updated the RSS feed so shipped work has a clearer chronology.

item.title: Version 0.9: proof got its own room
item.description: Added a dedicated work page with case-study structure and a freshness signal so visitors can browse proof without excavating the homepage.

item.title: Signal Garden shipped publicly
item.description: Published Signal Garden, a small browser toy where clicks plant glowing procedural blooms with generated names.
